name: android-dev-tools
description: Android development tools for Claude Code - build performance, remote signing, documentation generation, and marketplace management

plugins.name: android-dev-tools
plugins.description: Marketplace management tools. Includes install-all to install all plugins, and update to sync marketplace.json.

plugins.name: gradle-build-performance
plugins.description: Debug and optimize Android/Gradle build performance. Analyze build scans, identify bottlenecks, enable configuration cache.

plugins.name: apply-remote-sign
plugins.description: Auto-configure remote APK signing for Android projects. Supports Groovy DSL and Kotlin DSL. Includes AndroidAutoRemoteSignTool.

plugins.name: update-docs
plugins.description: Auto-generate Chinese technical documentation for Android projects. Analyzes structure, generates interfaces, navigation, components docs.
